name: kimi-delegate
description: Delegate implementation tasks from Codex to Kimi Code through a local MCP bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate Codex implementation tasks to Kimi Code.
interface.longDescription: A local bridge that lets Codex coordinate, review, and continue implementation tasks executed by Kimi Code.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the kimi-delegate tools when the user wants Codex to coordinate a software task while Kimi Code performs the implementation. Prepare a spec and plan, delegate with `kimi_delegate_task`, wait with `kimi_wait_until_idle`, gather the handoff and diff with `kimi_get_handoff` and `kimi_get_diff`, and continue with `kimi_continue_task` until acceptance criteria pass. Do not auto-approve destructive commands.
